added_items.final_wording: Defines sprains and strains, common ankle, knee, wrist and muscle contexts, Dubai telehealth scope, injury mechanisms, athletic activity, overexertion, repetitive motion, and recurrence risks.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
source.population: People with muscle sprains or strains suitable for virtual assessment.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for sprain- or strain-compatible injury documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad foot, hand, sports, fracture, operative, or diagnosis-specific workflows.

exact_location.heading: 1–6 Background, scope, applicability, causes, and risk factors

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines sprains and strains, common ankle, knee, wrist and muscle contexts, Dubai telehealth scope, injury mechanisms, athletic activity, overexertion, repetitive motion, and recurrence risks.

added_items.rationale: Reviewed to establish sprain and strain scope; no additional broad injury items were mapped from scope alone.

added_items.final_wording: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
source.population: People with muscle sprains or strains suitable for virtual assessment.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for sprain- or strain-compatible injury documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad foot, hand, sports, fracture, operative, or diagnosis-specific workflows.

exact_location.heading: 7 Symptoms and signs; 7.4 Relevant history

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped sprain and strain terminology, mechanisms, symptoms, function, recurrence, and assessed findings.

added_items.final_wording: Identifies severe pain or swelling, discoloration, weakness, movement loss, numbness, coldness, deformity, persistent symptoms, fracture or dislocation concern, and clinician-selected radiography, ultrasound, or MRI.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
source.population: People with muscle sprains or strains suitable for virtual assessment.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for sprain- or strain-compatible injury documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad foot, hand, sports, fracture, operative, or diagnosis-specific workflows.

exact_location.heading: 8 Red flags; 9 Differential diagnosis; 10 Investigations

source.evidence_paraphrase: Identifies severe pain or swelling, discoloration, weakness, movement loss, numbness, coldness, deformity, persistent symptoms, fracture or dislocation concern, and clinician-selected radiography, ultrasound, or MRI.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped deformity, movement, neurovascular, severe-swelling, pop, and selected X-ray concern fields.

added_items.final_wording: Supports clinician-documented RICE, activity protection, mobilization, analgesia, physical therapy, return to activity, one-week review, worsening review, and urgent escalation for severe, neurovascular, deformity, weight-bearing, fever, or hot-joint concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
source.population: People with muscle sprains or strains suitable for virtual assessment.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for sprain- or strain-compatible injury documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad foot, hand, sports, fracture, operative, or diagnosis-specific workflows.

exact_location.heading: 11 Management; 12 Referral criteria

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-documented RICE, activity protection, mobilization, analgesia, physical therapy, return to activity, one-week review, worsening review, and urgent escalation for severe, neurovascular, deformity, weight-bearing, fever, or hot-joint concerns.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped clinician-documented RICE, activity, analgesia, return, review, and follow-up fields.
